messages.content: Answer in one short sentence: Why should error messages be specific?

chosen.content: Specific error messages help users understand what went wrong and how to fix it.

messages.content: Reply politely: I cannot log in to my account.

chosen.content: Sorry you are running into this. Please share the exact error and I will help you troubleshoot it.

messages.content: Explain briefly: Why should API examples be realistic?

chosen.content: Realistic API examples are easier to adapt to production use.

messages.content: Respond in one sentence: Why is reproducibility useful in ML experiments?

chosen.content: Reproducibility helps confirm results and compare changes with confidence.

messages.content: Write a concise response: Why should commit messages be clear?

chosen.content: Clear commit messages make project history easier to scan and understand.

messages.content: One sentence only: Why are smaller batch sizes sometimes used on limited hardware?

chosen.content: Smaller batch sizes reduce memory usage and help training fit on constrained GPUs.

messages.content: Make this more helpful: Check the docs.

chosen.content: Please check the setup section of the docs first, and if anything is unclear I can help narrow it down.

messages.content: Answer briefly: Why should prompts be short in tiny demos?

chosen.content: Short prompts reduce memory use and make debugging training runs faster.
